title: The war in Iran has driven the transatlantic relationship further apart
subhead: French President Emmanuel Macron hosted a conference on freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz without the US, as even Washington's closest European partners, including Germany and Italy, are openly beginning to distance themselves.

subhead: Two gunboats from Iran's Revolutionary Guard opened fire on a tanker transiting the Strait of Hormuz, the British military's United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations center said.

title: France opens the sensitive issue of slavery reparations
subhead: Following a visit by President John Dramani Mahama to the Elysée, Ghana's foreign affairs minister announced on April 8 that Paris would be willing to 'collaborate' on 'restorative justice.' Those close to Emmanuel Macron confirmed that the French president supported the initiative.

title: French film star Nathalie Baye dead at 77
subhead: Baye, a stalwart of French cinema, starred in some 80 films and took home the Best Actress Cesar. She notably played Leonardo DiCaprio's mother in Steven Spielberg's 'Catch Me if You Can.'

title: Rubirosa's celebration of noble chic in the heart of Paris
subhead: Designer Lauren Rubinski has created her small Parisian boutique as an old-fashioned jewel box. Her refined, unisex range, where shirts take center stage, has attracted a clientele who value quality above all else.
